body_txt: A character, often portrayed as The Ditz or a Cloudcuckoolander , cannot remember the name of another, despite having adequate opportunities to learn it. Conversely, the other character could have an Overly Long Name long that no one could be expected to memorize. Often, the two are colleagues who see each other regularly. This can turn into a Running Gag . This trope covers general light-hearted instances. If they do it on purpose to be rude, it's Malicious Misnaming . Alternately:
